title: Claude Code Skills Pack: Automated Report Generation — 5 Skills for Scheduling and Distributing Recurring Reports
description: For analytics leads and operations analysts, this pack covers parameterized report templating, scheduling logic, multi-format export (PDF, CSV, Slack), recipient segmentation, and delivery audit logging across 5 skills so they can eliminate manual report-running from their weekly workflow entirely
gumroad_description:
Manual report-running is a time tax. This pack ends it.

Who this is for:
— Analytics leads who re-run the same reports every Monday morning
— Operations analysts who paste data into the same template weekly
— Data engineers tired of fielding "can you re-send that PDF?" requests

What's inside:
— Skill 1: Parameterized report templating (reusable across any dataset)
— Skill 2: Scheduling logic setup (cron-ready, environment-aware)
— Skill 3: Multi-format export handler (PDF, CSV, and Slack push in one command)
— Skill 4: Recipient segmentation rules (right report to right audience automatically)
— Skill 5: Delivery audit logger (track what was sent, when, and to whom)
— Installation guide + quick-reference trigger table

Five skills, zero manual re-running. Download and use it today.

Discover more tools like this at mini-on-ai.com
